rows.semantic_intent: SingleOwner invariant preserved through spawn (adds task + extends children)
downstream_impact: Closes SEM-06.F1 (asupersync-3cddg.6.6)
Feeds invariant_status_inventory.json upgrade to fully_proven

rows.semantic_intent: SingleOwner is an inductive invariant across all finite step sequences
assumptions: Initial state is wellformed and satisfies SingleOwner
downstream_impact: Closes SEM-06.F1 global inductive invariant
Provides multi-step closure guarantee

rows.semantic_intent: Idempotence: cancelRequest precondition is unsatisfiable when task already cancelRequested.
downstream_impact: Closes idempotence gap in inv.cancel.protocol
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Idempotence: cancelRequest precondition is unsatisfiable when task is cancelling.
downstream_impact: Closes idempotence gap in inv.cancel.protocol
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Idempotence: cancelRequest precondition is unsatisfiable when task is finalizing.
downstream_impact: Closes idempotence gap in inv.cancel.protocol
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Idempotence: cancelRequest precondition is unsatisfiable when task is completed.
downstream_impact: Closes idempotence gap in inv.cancel.protocol
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Master idempotence: any task not in {created, running} is in cancel-protocol or completed.
assumptions: Task state is not created and not running
downstream_impact: Canonical theorem for cancel_request_idempotence family
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Idempotence: cancelChild is blocked on tasks already in cancel-protocol states.
assumptions: Task state is in cancel-protocol (cancelRequested, cancelling, or finalizing)
downstream_impact: Extends idempotence guarantee to cancelChild constructor
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Monotonicity: strengthenOpt result rank >= incoming reason rank.
downstream_impact: Supports monotone reason-strength invariant across cancel protocol

rows.semantic_intent: Monotonicity: strengthenOpt result rank >= existing reason rank.
downstream_impact: Supports monotone reason-strength invariant across cancel protocol

rows.semantic_intent: Generic monotonicity: strengthenOpt never weakens existing cancel reason rank.
downstream_impact: Supports monotone reason-strength invariant across cancel protocol

rows.semantic_intent: Race-loser drain: if a region is closed, all children in its task list are completed.
downstream_impact: Foundational for race_loser_drain_completeness
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Race-loser drain: per-child specialization — any specific child of a closed region is completed.
assumptions: Task is a member of the region's children list
downstream_impact: Per-child version of closed_region_children_all_completed
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Race-loser drain: Quiescent region implies LoserDrained for any two race participants.
assumptions: Both race participants are members of the region's children list
downstream_impact: Core projection from Quiescent to LoserDrained
Feeds race_loser_drain_completeness

rows.semantic_intent: Race-loser drain: decomposes Quiescent into allTasksCompleted + allRegionsClosed + empty obligations/finalizers.
downstream_impact: Quiescence decomposition for race-loser analysis
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: Central SEM-06.F3 theorem: after a close step sequence, race losers are fully drained (both participants completed).
assumptions: Steps sequence from initial to final state
Region transitions from open to closed
Both race participants are children of the region
downstream_impact: Canonical theorem for race_loser_drain family
Closes inv.race.losers_drained invariant gap

rows.semantic_intent: Liveness: a cancelled child's cancel potential strictly decreases, ensuring drain progress.
assumptions: Task state is in cancel protocol (cancelRequested, cancelling, or finalizing)
downstream_impact: Liveness guarantee for child drain during close protocol
Feeds constructor coverage in formal/lean/coverage/step_constructor_coverage.json

rows.semantic_intent: No-leak: WF projection — obligation in ledger must be in reserved state.
downstream_impact: Building block for non_reserved_excluded_from_ledger and leaked_not_in_ledger
Canonical theorem for obligation_no_leak family

rows.semantic_intent: No-leak: contrapositive — non-reserved obligations excluded from all ledgers.
downstream_impact: Proves committed/aborted/leaked obligations cannot hide in ledger
Feeds leaked_not_in_ledger

rows.semantic_intent: No-leak: leaked obligations cannot appear in any region's ledger.
downstream_impact: Core no-hiding guarantee: leaked obligations never block close
Feeds leaked_tracked_and_non_blocking

rows.semantic_intent: No-leak: characterizes leak precondition — requires completed task holding reserved obligation.
downstream_impact: Precondition characterization for bounded assumption reasoning
Feeds no_leak_from_proper_lifecycle

rows.semantic_intent: No-leak: conditional — proper task lifecycle discipline prevents leak step from firing.
assumptions: No completed task holds reserved obligations
downstream_impact: Formalizes bounded assumption: zero leaked obligations under discipline
Closes gap for conditional no-leak execution guarantee

rows.semantic_intent: No-leak global: well-formed execution ending in close preserves WF, empties ledger, tracks all obligations.
downstream_impact: Central global no-obligation-leak execution theorem
Canonical theorem for obligation_no_leak family

rows.semantic_intent: No-leak: leaked obligations are permanently tracked, never block close, and remain stable.
assumptions: Obligation exists and is in leaked state
downstream_impact: Proves leaked obligations are accounted damage — tracked, non-blocking, stable
Closes the obligation lifecycle soundness argument

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority: spawn requires open region and task absence — entity existence gates the effect.
downstream_impact: Per-label authority gating for spawn constructor
Feeds no_ambient_effect_without_context composite

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority: commit requires obligation holder match — entity ownership gates the effect.
downstream_impact: Per-label authority gating for commit constructor
Feeds no_ambient_effect_without_context composite

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority: abort requires obligation holder match — entity ownership gates the effect.
downstream_impact: Per-label authority gating for abort constructor
Feeds no_ambient_effect_without_context composite

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority: close requires region existence, finalizing state, and quiescence — entity existence gates the effect.
downstream_impact: Per-label authority gating for close constructor
Feeds no_ambient_effect_without_context composite

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority composite: every non-tau non-tick step requires entity existence witness (exhaustive over 22 constructors).
assumptions: Step fires with non-tau non-tick label
downstream_impact: Central SEM-06.F5 theorem closing inv.authority.no_ambient
Canonical theorem for no_ambient_authority family

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority composite: every non-tau non-tick step requires entity existence witness (exhaustive over 22 constructors).
assumptions: Step fires with non-tau non-tick label
downstream_impact: Cross-cutting authority gating coverage for commit constructor

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority composite: every non-tau non-tick step requires entity existence witness (exhaustive over 22 constructors).
assumptions: Step fires with non-tau non-tick label
downstream_impact: Cross-cutting authority gating coverage for abort constructor

rows.semantic_intent: No-ambient-authority composite: every non-tau non-tick step requires entity existence witness (exhaustive over 22 constructors).
assumptions: Step fires with non-tau non-tick label
downstream_impact: Cross-cutting authority gating coverage for close constructor
